package rulecoverage

func NegativeMigrationOrSeedLogicCallableFromRequestHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "migration_or_seed_logic_callable_from_request_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Request handlers that can trigger migration or seed workflows."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
